lastStrategyDecision.reason: Evidence remains low-conviction for automated intraday execution: marketCondition is neutral, averageRelativeVolume is ~1.0 (no participation edge), averageGapPercent is negative (-0.75%) reducing clean momentum continuation odds, averageLiquidityScore ~45.9 implies moderate slippage/stop uncertainty, and averageCatalystScore ~20.8 is weak (lower follow-through probability). While uptrendShare ~0.60 is mildly supportive and all candidates are fresh, overall quality does not justify allocating risk under the current high confidence/quality requirements. Maintain conservative long-only pullback-to-VWAP with bracket exits, but do not place new orders until RVOL/liquidity/catalyst strength improve. Paper active exploration is enabled: live market data is fresh and the setup quality is acceptable, so the desk may take small paper trades while risk gates remain active.
